modulation_patterns.description: Four independent carriers (OP1, OP2, OP3, OP4)

envelope_types.name: SSG-EG (Software EG)
envelope_types.description: Sega-Saturn style EG loop patterns (repeat, hold, invert). Only supported on some revisions (YM3438/YM2612 variant).

envelope_types.name: AR_DR_SL_SR_RR
envelope_types.description: Standard ADSR with sustain level and secondary decay rate.
